Lumify
Table of Contents

Class UsersController

Namespace
lumify.api.Controllers
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

User profile and account management plus user discovery: editing the current user's profile and avatar, deleting the account, reading profile/account/preview data by ID or for the current user, recent activity (todos/events/notes), related users, and user search. All endpoints require an authenticated user.

[ApiController]
[Route("users/[action]")]
[Authorize]
public class UsersController : ControllerBase
Inheritance
object
ControllerBase
UsersController

Remarks

Account deletion is a soft-delete: personal content becomes inaccessible while workspace content stays with the workspace. Preview/search results are enriched with each user's live presence status.

Constructors

UsersController(ILogger<UsersController>, LumifyDbContext, IPresenceService)

Creates the controller with its injected logger, database context and presence service.

public UsersController(ILogger<UsersController> logger, LumifyDbContext db, IPresenceService presenceService)

Parameters

logger ILogger<UsersController>
db LumifyDbContext
presenceService IPresenceService

Methods

DeleteAccount(CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes the current user's own account by setting DeletedAt.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteAccount")]
[Authorize]
public Task<IActionResult> DeleteAccount(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with success = true; 401 if the user ID claim is missing; 404 if the user does not exist.

Remarks

Content is not cascaded: personal items become inaccessible (the user can no longer log in), while workspace items stay with the workspace and remain visible and editable for the other members.

Get5LastModifiedTodosOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's 5 most recently modified todo lists.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("get5LastModifiedTodosOfUser")]
public Task<IActionResult> Get5LastModifiedTodosOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with up to 5 todo lists, newest first.

GetAvatarOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's avatar URL.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAvatarOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<string>> GetAvatarOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<string>>

200 with the avatar URL; 404 if the user does not exist.

GetLast5ModifiedEventsOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's 5 most recently modified events.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getLast5ModifiedEventsOfUser")]
public Task<IActionResult> GetLast5ModifiedEventsOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with up to 5 events, newest first.

GetLast5ModifiedNotesOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's 5 most recently modified notes.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getLast5ModifiedNotesOfUser")]
public Task<IActionResult> GetLast5ModifiedNotesOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with up to 5 notes, newest first.

GetRelatedUsers(CancellationToken)

Returns the users that share at least one workspace with the current user (excluding the current user), each enriched with live presence status.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getRelatedUsers")]
public Task<IActionResult> GetRelatedUsers(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with the list of related users (empty if the user is in no workspaces); 400 if the current user cannot be determined.

GetUserAccountInfo(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's own account info (name, e-mail, username, timestamps).

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getUserAccountInfo")]
public Task<ActionResult<UserAccountInfoResponse>> GetUserAccountInfo(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<UserAccountInfoResponse>>

200 with the account info; 404 if it cannot be found.

GetUserAccountInfoWithID(string, CancellationToken)

Returns the account info (e-mail, first/last name, timestamps) of a specific user by ID.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getUserAccountInfoWithID")]
public Task<ActionResult<UserAccountInfoResponse>> GetUserAccountInfoWithID(string userID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

userID string

The user to look up.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<UserAccountInfoResponse>>

200 with the account info; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the user does not exist.

GetUserPreviewWithID(string, CancellationToken)

Returns a compact user preview (username, display name, avatar, e-mail) by ID, enriched with the user's live presence status.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getUserPreviewWithID")]
public Task<ActionResult<UserPreviewResponse>> GetUserPreviewWithID(string userID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

userID string

The user to look up.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<UserPreviewResponse>>

200 with the preview; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the user does not exist.

GetUserProfile(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's own profile (display name, avatar, bio).

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getUserProfile")]
public Task<ActionResult<UserAccountInfoResponse>> GetUserProfile(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<UserAccountInfoResponse>>

200 with the profile; 404 if it cannot be found.

GetUserProfileWithID(string, CancellationToken)

Returns the public profile (display name, avatar, bio) of a specific user by ID.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getUserProfileWithID")]
public Task<ActionResult<UserProfileResponse>> GetUserProfileWithID(string userID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

userID string

The user to look up.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<UserProfileResponse>>

200 with the profile; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the user does not exist.

SaveUserAvatar(IFormFile, CancellationToken)

Uploads and stores the current user's avatar image (max 10 MB; JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF) and saves its relative URL on the user.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("saveUserAvatar")]
[Authorize]
[RequestSizeLimit(10000000)]
public Task<ActionResult<string>> SaveUserAvatar(IFormFile file, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

file IFormFile

The uploaded image file.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<string>>

200 with the stored avatar URL; 400 if the file is missing, not an image, or has no extension; 401 if the user ID claim is missing; 404 if the user does not exist.

SaveUserProfile(SaveUserProfileRequest, CancellationToken)

Updates the current user's profile (display name, avatar URL and/or bio). Only the provided fields are changed; empty values clear the respective field.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveUserProfile")]
[Authorize]
public Task<ActionResult<UserProfileResponse>> SaveUserProfile(SaveUserProfileRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveUserProfileRequest

The profile fields to change.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<UserProfileResponse>>

200 with the updated profile; 400 if the request is missing; 401 if the user ID claim is missing; 404 if the user does not exist.

SearchAvailableUsersForWorkspace(string, string, CancellationToken)

Searches users who can still be added to a given workspace — i.e. matching the query but excluding the current user and existing members (max 20 results).

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("searchAvailableUsersForWorkspace")]
[Authorize]
public Task<IActionResult> SearchAvailableUsersForWorkspace(string workspaceID, string query, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace to find addable users for.

query string

The search term; an empty term returns an empty list.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with the addable users; 400 if the current user cannot be determined or the workspace ID is missing; 404 if the workspace does not exist.

SearchUsers(string, CancellationToken)

Searches users by display name, username or e-mail (case-insensitive, max 20 results), excluding the current user. Results carry live presence status.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("searchUsers")]
[Authorize]
public Task<IActionResult> SearchUsers(string query, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

query string

The search term; an empty term returns an empty list.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<IActionResult>

200 with the matching users; 400 if the current user cannot be determined.
